title: AI Miniature Train Set
description: Turns a photo into a detailed model railway miniature scene.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a detailed miniature model railway scene. Preserve the main layout, number of people, recognizable identity cues, pose, camera angle, clothing colors, and environment context as tiny scale-model figures and scenery. Add tilt-shift depth, model buildings, miniature tracks where appropriate, painted terrain, tabletop lighting, and crafted hobby-detail realism. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, changed identity, extra people, distorted faces, malformed figures, duplicate limbs, full-size realism, messy scale, low quality, blurry, toy chaos, unreadable signage, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. model railway town, tilt-shift miniature...
